name: audit-pack-emit --format json writes bundle.json into compliance/audit-packs/<commit-sha>-<utc-timestamp>/ per §2.24
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack-emit.sh" --format json --commit-sha abc123 --generated-at 2026-05-25T00:00:00Z --out-dir out 2>err.txt && [ -f out/abc123-2026-05-25T00:00:00Z/bundle.json ] && echo ok 1>&2
